configurations.name: portal
runtimeArgs: import http.server, socketserver, os; os.chdir('C:/Users/Aggie/Documents/TWLF_Portal'); handler = http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler; handler.extensions_map['.css'] = 'text/css'; handler.extensions_map['.js'] = 'application/javascript'; httpd = socketserver.TCPServer(('', 3000), handler); httpd.serve_forever()
